name: controle-concorrencia-sql
description: Demonstracao de Controle de Concorrencia Otimista (CCO) em atualizacoes de estoque com Node.js, PostgreSQL, Prisma e pg, usando os padroes Strategy, Factory, Decorator e Repository.

scripts.pretest: npx prisma migrate deploy && npx prisma generate
scripts.pretest:integration: npx prisma migrate deploy && npx prisma generate
scripts.prestart: npx prisma migrate deploy && npx prisma generate
scripts.predev: npx prisma migrate deploy && npx prisma generate
scripts.preseed:prisma: npx prisma migrate deploy && npx prisma generate

author: Felps03
